headline: Your outfit — built for a guy who likes wearing suits: tailored, high formality, quiet palette.

sections.heading: The recommendation
sections.blurb: Sharp without the full suit: black wool suit trousers, crisp white oxford, black double monks. Everything sits at the same formality level, monochrome palette, slim silhouette top to bottom.

items.name: carven mens slim oxford shirt
items.reason: Crisp white, slim cut, no pockets — the most suit-native shirt in the catalog.

items.name: givenchy slim wool trousers
items.reason: True suit trousers (wool, slim, black) — the anchor of the look.

items.name: prada double monk strap shoe
items.reason: Double monks: formal enough for the trousers, more interesting than a plain oxford.

sections.heading: Swaps if you want to dial it

items.name: gucci white cotton chest pocket
items.reason: Slightly more relaxed shirt if the monks feel too formal.

items.name: cole haan rollins leather cap-toe
items.reason: The classic choice if double monks are too loud.

items.name: wooyoungmi striped tailored trousers
items.reason: One pattern, if you want the trousers to be the focal point.
